c00.text: 1 non-Boss Enemy within 2 spaces doesn't Activate

c06.name: Bolt Paper
c06.note: Icon is a single grey right-pointing arrowhead; speed tier (fast/medium/slow) not distinguishable from this image alone

c08.name: Antidote

c16.name: Bold Hunter's Mark
